Meeting Minutes: Product Launch Sync
Date: 2026-04-28
Participants: Sarah (PM), Mike (Eng), Elena (Design), David (Marketing)

Sarah: Okay everyone, let's get started. We have two weeks until the launch of the new dashboard. Mike, how's the backend integration going?
Mike: It's mostly done. We hit a small snag with the caching layer but it should be resolved by Friday. I need to finish the API documentation for the mobile team though.
Sarah: Great. Mike, please ensure the API docs are updated and shared with the mobile team by EOD Thursday.
Mike: Will do.
Elena: From the design side, we've finalized the icons. I've uploaded them to Figma.
Sarah: Elena, can you send the direct link to David? He needs them for the marketing materials.
Elena: Sure, I'll send that link to David right after this meeting.
David: Thanks, Elena. Marketing-wise, we're ready to go. I just need to finalize the press release.
Sarah: David, you should also sync with the legal team to make sure the terminology in the press release is approved.
David: Good point. I'll schedule a call with Legal for tomorrow morning.
Sarah: Perfect. Also, we need a volunteer to set up the launch day war room on Slack.
Elena: I can do that. I'll set it up and invite everyone by next Monday.
Sarah: Thanks, Elena. Anything else? 
Mike: Just a reminder that we have a scheduled maintenance this weekend.
Sarah: Right. Let's make sure that's communicated clearly. Okay, thanks everyone!
